title: Section 20
content: 12 Any person aggrieved by an order of the competent authority refusing to grant the permission referred to in sub-section (1) of section 6A or referred to in sub-section (1) of section 19 may, within such time as may be prescribed, prefer an appeal to the Administrator and the Administrator may, after hearing the appellant, decide such appeal and his decision shall be final.
footnote: 12. Subs. by Act 43 of 1964, s. 11, for section 20 (w.e.f. 27-2-1965).
